resources.string: GoToShelter monitors emergency early warnings in real-time. When a warning is detected, it automatically launches Waze or Google Maps to navigate you to the nearest shelter.
To receive alerts from "Tzofar", grant location and notification permissions. Location will only be used when an alert is received to check if it applies to your location.
To receive alerts from "Home Front Command", grant Notification Access.
To start Waze only when driving, grant Activity permission. It will only be used when an alert is received.
Mandatory for automatic navigation launch. Allows the app to start Waze immediately when an alert is received.
Waze or Google Maps has to be installed in order to use this app
This app does not store or transmit any data. It is open source and available on GitHub.
